headline: FY2024 Annual Results — 47 aircraft grounded at P&W peak
key_claim: 47 neo aircraft currently grounded; expect peak of 50 by Sep 2024; €198.6M P&W compensation received in FY2024; groundings to resolve by end of calendar 2026

headline: Q1 FY2025 — 44% earnings drop as groundings bite
key_claim: 46 aircraft grounded at 30 Jun 2024; revised peak forecast now 47 (down from 50); 300-day engine TAT assumption; CEO warned of prolonged disruption

headline: H1 FY2025 — €146M P&W compensation; 41 grounded at Sep 30
key_claim: 41 aircraft grounded at 30 Sep 2024; expects 40-45 on ground for next 18 months; Varadi: 'better visibility to manage GTF issues to their expected conclusion in F27'

headline: Wizz Air secures new P&W commercial support deal through end-2026
key_claim: ~40 aircraft grounded; new P&W agreement covers direct costs through end of calendar 2026; compensation 'consistent with levels currently being received'

headline: FY2025 Full Year — operating profit crashes 61.7%; timeline slips to end-2027
key_claim: Average 44 aircraft grounded in FY2025 (~20% of fleet); 37 grounded at 9 May 2025; target unground all by end 2027 — one year later than original plan; expects ~34 by end H1 FY2026

headline: Q1 FY2026 — 41 grounded; profit misses forecasts by 69%
key_claim: 41 aircraft grounded at 30 Jun 2025 (vs 46 a year ago); operating profit €27M vs €87M forecast; expects average 35 grounded in 2026; GTF Advantage entry expected early 2026; full resolution target March 2027

headline: Wizz Air strikes new P&W compensation deal covering 2025-2026
key_claim: New compensation package from P&W covering direct costs for grounded aircraft through calendar 2026; deal announced alongside H1 FY2026 capacity guidance

headline: CFO: 'Extremely frustrating' — CEO: 'At mercy of the manufacturer'
key_claim: 38 grounded (down from peak of ~60 a year ago); CFO Ian Malin: 'extremely frustrating — we've been dealing with it now for two-and-a-half years'; CEO Varadi: 'we don't fully control our destiny here; we are at the mercy of the manufacturer'; 'no absolute guarantee' fleet fully operational by 2027

headline: Q3 FY2026 — 33 grounded; P&W compensation extended to end-2027
key_claim: 33 aircraft grounded (down from 40 a year ago); 10% revenue growth; net loss narrowing; CFO: 'we are fully covered until end of 2027' — P&W deal extended beyond industry-standard 2026 cutoff due to Wizz Air's status as largest GTF operator; CEO: 'plan to uplift aircraft completely by end of 2027'
